response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack/web software developer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, MongoDB) with no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator architecture, deep neural network optimization, GPU workload analysis, or performance analysis at the silicon level. The role requires a principal-level hardware/performance architect for AI accelerators, which is a fundamentally different domain from the candidate's career trajectory. While they have ~14 years of software experience (meeting the BS + 8 years quantitative bar), the qualitative domain mismatch is severe.
strengths: 14+ years of professional software engineering experience
Low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby (DLang, async I/O, high-throughput)
Some C/C++ exposure via National Instruments LabWindows/CVI
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience
No AI/ML, deep learning, or GPU workload optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD, accelerator, or hardware-software co-design exposure

key_factors.factor: Missing hardware architecture and SoC modeling background
No AI accelerator or deep learning workload expertise
